name: Lemon-Orange Filling
recipeInstructions: Combine sugar, flour, salt, and water in a heavy saucepan. Stir well. Add fruit rinds and juices. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and boils. Gradually stir about one-fourth of the hot mixture into the egg yolks, then add to the remaining hot mixture, stirring constantly. Return to a boil; cook 1 to 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and let cool completely. Yield: 2-1/4 cups.
